book_summary: Ephesians 1-6 has full chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layers. Verse-number alignment is preserved in both restored and mystical files. The book preserves the cosmic union-in-Messiah vision: all things gathered in Messiah, grace through trust, one new humanity, shared access in one Spirit, the assembly as body/fullness, body maturity through gifts, love/light walk, household-code safeguards, and armor as spiritual resilience.

chapters.notes: Cosmic blessing in Messiah, chosen in love, adoption, redemption/release, mystery of will, summing up/gathering all things in Messiah, inheritance, Spirit seal/pledge, eyes of heart illuminated, Messiah above powers, assembly as body/fullness.

Dead in misalignment made alive with Messiah, grace through trust, Divine workmanship for good works, nations once far brought near, dividing wall torn down, one new human, reconciliation in one body, household/temple/dwelling in Spirit. Anti-replacement safety note included.

Mystery unveiled: nations co-heirs, co-body, co-sharers of promise; stewardship of grace; many-sided wisdom of Divine made known through assembly to heavenly powers; rooted/founded in love; breadth/length/height/depth; fullness of Divine.

Walk worthy of calling, one body/Spirit/Lord/trust/baptism/Divine, gifts for equipping/restoration and body maturity, truthing in love, old/new human, renewed mind, speech as grace, kindness and forgiveness.

Imitate Divine, walk in love, children of light, wake sleeper, Spirit-filled singing/thanks, mutual subjection, household code with domination/abuse safeguard, Messiah self-giving love, body/one-flesh mystery.

Children/parents, enslaved/masters with safeguard against sanctifying slavery/domination, full armor of Divine as spiritual resilience, struggle not against blood/flesh, truth/justice/peace/trust/salvation/Spirit-word/prayer, Tychicus, final peace/grace.

translation_notes: Ephesians should preserve the letter's cosmic union-in-Messiah vision without flattening it into abstract doctrine.
En Christo should be handled as in Messiah / in union with Messiah where context supports.
Mystērion should be mystery; oikonomia stewardship/administration; plērōma fullness; anakephalaiōsasthai summed up / headed up / gathered under one head.
Ekklesia should remain assembly/community where helpful, and body imagery should stay organic and relational.
Ethnē should generally be nations/Gentiles according to context; preserve one-new-humanity reconciliation without anti-Jewish or replacement readings.
Charis is grace/gift-favor; pistis trust/faith; agapē love; eirēnē peace/wholeness; pneuma Spirit/breath.
Household-code chapters require safeguards against sanctifying domination; read them through mutuality, Messiah-love, and the whole letter's body unity.
Armor imagery should be treated as spiritual resilience and truth/justice/peace, not violence against people.
Mystical companion layer remains interpretive and does not replace source-audited restored text.
Verse-number alignment must remain intact in both restored and mystical companion files.

Ephesians 1-3 establishes the cosmic union foundation: all things gathered in Messiah, grace through trust, one new humanity, shared access in one Spirit, the assembly as Spirit-dwelling body/fullness, and the mystery of nations as co-heirs/co-body rooted in love and fullness.

Ephesians 4-6 completes the letter by turning cosmic oneness into embodied practice: body maturity through gifts, truthing in love, new-human ethics, love/light walk, household code constrained by mutual reverence and self-giving love, and armor as prayerful resilience against harmful powers rather than people.
next_actions: Begin next book according to project plan. Suggested next: Philippians, to develop joy, partnership, Messiah hymn, humility, pressing toward the goal, peace beyond understanding, and contentment.

Add glossary entries or reuse hooks: en Christo, mystērion, oikonomia, plērōma, anakephalaiōsasthai, ekklesia, ethnē, charis, pistis, agapē, eirēnē, pneuma, one new humanity, co-heirs/co-body, fullness of Divine, truthing in love, household code safeguards, and armor/resilience.
